headline: EA buyout debt draws $25 billion in orders as banks navigate volatile markets
summary: Investing.com -- Investor demand for Electronic Arts Inc (NASDAQ:EA) nearly $15 billion debt offering has reached approximately $25 billion, a sign of resilient appetite for large-scale buyouts even as Wall Street banks struggle with a "white-knuckle" credit environment.

content.title: EA buyout debt draws $25 billion in orders as banks navigate volatile markets
